scripts.db:setup: wrangler d1 execute skipper-detergents-db --local --file=./src/db/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute skipper-detergents-db --local --file=./src/db/seed.sql
scripts.db:reset:local: wrangler d1 execute skipper-detergents-db --local --command="SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name NOT LIKE 'sqlite_%';" && pnpm run db:setup
